subtitle: Doors opening — build the pipeline

planetInfluences.summary: Opens doors and widens the pipeline

tropicalReading.body: Today is Expansion — usable openings under pressure. Build leverage, document the move, and keep formal commitments for later. Mercury sextile Mercury sharpens the operating language: edit the ask, tighten the numbers, send the clean version. Uranus sextile Jupiter favors unconventional contract pathways, but volatility around foundations punishes overreach. In this 12th-House profection year, Capricorn Rising wins through preparation. Saturn is the quiet edit, not the loud cut.

traditionalReading.body:
Today is Expansion — usable opening, not permission to overcommit. Work the 9th whole-sign profection: Virgo makes Mercury lord of the month, and Mercury is strong in domicile and exaltation, now supported by exact Mercury sextile Mercury. Write, ask, compare, negotiate terms, and move the best door one step forward. The trap is speed: out-of-sect Mars makes impatience expensive. Mercury is the clean ledger, not the speech.

Moon today — Moon in Leo, your 8th whole-sign house. Handle shared money, trust, and obligations with tact; do not reopen old value disputes.

vedicReading.body:
Today is Expansion — useful openings under pressure. Take the meeting, send the message, refine the move plan, and keep signatures for later. For Sagittarius Lagna, the Vimshottari Moon–Venus–Jupiter chain supports relationship and value conversations, while Ashlesha makes hidden obligations louder. Moon conjunct Venus helps rapport; Mars trine Mercury turns logistics into action. Small Panoti is the quiet edit, not the loud cut. Ignore drama; build documents, cash-flow clarity, and leverage for Aug 12–Sep 5.

Moon today — Moon in Cancer, your 8th house, nakshatra Ashlesha pada 4. Watch what gets tangled in shared money, home logistics, and unspoken expectations; clean the obligation before it becomes a negotiation.

baziReading.body: Today is Gui-Hai Expansion — Yin Water Officer gives Ding Fire a rule, and Pig joins your Rabbit into a Wood Resource current. Use Mang Zhong’s Jia-Wu month to open doors, document terms, and build leverage inside the Wu-Zi Da Yun and 2026 Horse Ben Ming peer-fire field. Fire spreads fastest when the channel is narrow. Move visibly, but do not turn competition into compulsion or scatter into too many parallel fires; heat becomes burnout.

tropicalMonthly.body: The dominant factor is preparation: with Capricorn Rising in a 12th-House annual profection, this month is for building pipeline, leverage, and quiet proof before late-August commitments ask for form. Gemini Sun keeps the first stretch tactical; after the Cancer ingress on 2026-06-21, partnerships, clients, and agreements require cleaner boundaries. The valuation cycle you work, not a predetermined one, runs through the 2nd-House North Node self-valuation arc: price contribution, protect attention, and stop over-refining 8th-House Virgo systems for other people’s ownership. Jupiter return pressure builds toward 2026-07-12, supporting openings, but Saturn-in-8th contract realism keeps compensation, risk, and shared obligations under scrutiny. On 2026-07-16, career sensitivity and competence overlap; use feedback as structural leverage, not as a referendum. This is scaffolding going up behind the wall: useful, unglamorous, and hard to fake.

traditionalMonthly.body: Until June 30, the monthly profection is the 9th whole-sign house, Virgo, with Mercury as lord of the month; Mercury is natally in Virgo, in domicile and exaltation, so the main support is disciplined study, planning, writing, documentation, and sharper judgment. The lord of the year remains Jupiter over the 12th-house Sagittarius year, and in this day chart Jupiter’s help is stronger: build quietly, reduce waste, and prepare the pipeline. Mercury is presently supported by a close sextile and by Mars’ trine, but Mars is the out-of-sect malefic, so speed helps only when bounded by rules. Mars-Venus is friction looking for a build, not a fight. On June 30, the month hands to Venus and the 10th house, Libra: formalize selectively, ignore noise, and save weight-bearing commitments for after late August.

vedicMonthly.body: Dominant layer: Moon–Venus–Jupiter for Sagittarius Lagna makes this month about building leverage through people, money, property, and operational authority, while Sade Sati/Small Panoti keeps the cost of weak structure high through 2027-06-02. The active June 14–30 External Manifestation Window is a pivot window: clarify terms, reduce ambiguity, and move viable opportunities into a pipeline without forcing final commitments. The Moon starts in Ashlesha and cycles all 27 nakshatras, so treat emotional spikes as timing noise unless they reveal a practical bottleneck. Build documentation, cash-flow options, repair plans, and role authority now; ignore drama around fairness or value that has no executable next step. This month is scaffolding going up before the heavier visible load of Aug 12–Sep 5, 2026.

baziMonthly.body: The dominant layer is 戊子 Wu-Zi Da Yun pressure under the 2026 Bing-Wu Ben Ming peer-fire field: move visibly, but do not turn competition into compulsion or scatter into too many parallel fires. Today’s 癸亥 Gui-Hai Water field favors Power: rules, sequencing, risk control, and choosing the one channel that can carry weight. Jia-Wu month, opened by Mang Zhong, gives Ding Fire Resource feeding Horse-fire momentum; the support is real, but heat is the cost. On July 7, Xiao Shu hands the month to Yi-Wei, shifting from ignition to Output: build pipeline, proof, structure. Around July 12, treat the visible-move window as leverage to prepare, not a reason to overcommit. For the Rabbit core, this is a controlled burn: enough flame to show direction, not enough to consume the system.

tacticalSlots.note: Year branch repeats in 2026 — drive and visibility run hot
Natal month AND hour branch — structural pressure is real
Your true core branch — finesse, curation, clean expression over force
Mnemonic overlay only — not a natal pillar (literal hour branch is Monkey)

consensus.primaryAction: Negotiate better terms that create leverage today.

todaysInsight: Build leverage before you lock terms. Tighten the pipeline and price your contribution clearly.

opportunity: Jupiter is lord of the year (benefic regime)
approaching benefic window: Jupiter return — chapter reset (24d)
pressure: Sade Sati (Small Panoti) — pressure on foundations
momentum: BaZi Da Yun shift within 89 days
